executive_summary: Modules converge on a concern-defend-repair pattern with opportunities for clearer needs expression.

moderate_confidence_findings.title: Cross-module convergence on repair
moderate_confidence_findings.summary: Multiple modules identify concern, clarification, and acknowledgment moving toward repair.
limitations: synthesis based on module outputs only

convergence: Relationship and NVC modules both highlight repair movement by the final turn.
divergence: Systems module emphasizes feedback loops while NVC emphasizes unmet needs.
integrated_model: Concern raises interpretation, which shapes response, which can reinforce or repair the cycle.
interventions: Continue validating concerns before explaining intent.
outstanding_questions: How often do plan changes occur outside this excerpt?
limitations: Synthesis does not re-analyze the raw transcript.
